name: Sudoku Calendar
author: Poki
description: Sudoku Calendar elevates the classic Sudoku experience to new heights of fun! Select your Sudoku challenge of the day from the calendar, or test your skills with a random game! Adjust the difficulty level from easy to hard, and customize the grid by hiding impossible numbers for a clearer view. Need a little assistance? Don't worry, hints are available if you need them. It's time to solve some Sudoku games! How to play Sudoku Calendar? Click on the number to fill in the empty cell! Who created Sudoku Calendar? Sudoku Calendar is created by supernice.games. Play their other games on Poki: Breakoid and Flags ! How can I play Sudoku Calendar for free? You can play Sudoku Calendar for free on Poki. Can I play Sudoku Calendar on mobile devices and desktop? Sudoku Calendar can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
